ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bra_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bra size */,
  "band_size" INTEGER /* Band size of the bra */,
  "cup_size_range_start" TEXT /* Start of the cup size range */,
  "cup_size_range_end" TEXT /* End of the cup size range */,
  "brand_specific_conversion" TEXT /* Brand-specific size conversion notes */,
  "aa_cup" TEXT /* AA cup size range */,
  "a_cup" TEXT /* A cup size range */,
  "b_cup" TEXT /* B cup size range */,
  "c_cup" TEXT /* C cup size range */,
  "d_cup" TEXT /* D cup size range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bra_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bra type */,
  "bra_type" TEXT /* Type of bra (e.g., balconette, demi-cup, full-coverage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bra type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image showing the bra type */,
  "suitable_for" TEXT /* Description of body types or occasions the bra type is suitable for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bra_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bra product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the bra product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the bra product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size of the bra product (foreign key to bra_sizes table) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the bra product (foreign key to bra_types table) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the bra product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the bra */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the bra */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the product is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bra_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES bra_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bra_products_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES bra_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth for personalized recommendations */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer ID (foreign key to customers table) */,
  "bra_type_id" INTEGER /* Bra type ID (foreign key to bra_types table) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size ID (foreign key to bra_sizes table) */,
  "favorite_color" TEXT /* Customer's preferred color for bras */,
  "comfort_level" TEXT /* Customer's preferred comfort level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES bra_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_bra_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bra_type_id") REFERENCES bra_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer ID (foreign key to customers table) */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Product ID (foreign key to bra_products table) */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES bra_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer ID (foreign key to customers table) */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Product ID (foreign key to bra_products table) */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order was shipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES bra_products ("product_id")
)
